member.name: T:TreeSitter.CapturePredicateStep
member.summary: Represents a capture predicate step in a query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.CapturePredicateStep.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.CapturePredicateStep.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of the predicate step.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.CapturePredicateStep.Name
member.summary: Gets the capture name.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Edit
member.summary: Represents a summary of a change to a text document.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Edit.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Edit.#ctor(TreeSitter.Native.TSInputEdit)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a native structure.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Edit.StartIndex
member.summary: The start index of the change.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Edit.OldEndIndex
member.summary: The end index of the change before the edit.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Edit.NewEndIndex
member.summary: The end index of the change after the edit.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Edit.StartPosition
member.summary: The start position of the change.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Edit.OldEndPosition
member.summary: The end position of the change before the edit.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Edit.NewEndPosition
member.summary: The end position of the change after the edit.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.InputEncoding
member.summary: Represents the input encoding types supported by Tree-Sitter.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.InputEncoding.UTF8
member.summary: UTF-8 encoding.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.InputEncoding.UTF16LE
member.summary: UTF-16 Little Endian encoding.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.InputEncoding.UTF16BE
member.summary: UTF-16 Big Endian encoding.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.InputEncoding.Custom
member.summary: Custom encoding.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Language
member.summary: Represents a language used for parsing source code.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.#ctor(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A pointer to a raw language object.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.
member.remarks: The language identifier determines the library and function to load. The library is determined by prefixing the identifier with "tree-sitter-". The function name is determined by prefixing the identifier with "tree_sitter_".

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The library to load containing the parser language.
The function name of the function that creates a new language object.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Name
member.summary: Gets the language's name.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.AbiVersion
member.summary: Gets the language's ABI version.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.StateCount
member.summary: Gets the number of valid states in this language.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Symbols
member.summary: Gets a collection of distinct node types in the language.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.SupertypeSymbols
member.summary: Gets a collection of all supertype symbols for the language.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Fields
member.summary: Gets a collection of distinct field names in the language.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.Copy
member.summary: Creates a copy of the language.
member.returns: The copied language.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.GetSymbolIdFromName(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the numerical id for the given node type string.
member.returns: The symbol ID.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.GetFieldIdFromName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the numerical id for the given field name string.
member.returns: The field ID.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.GetNextState(System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Gets the next parse state.
member.returns: Combine this with lookahead iterators to generate completion suggestions or valid symbols in error nodes. Use for valid symbols.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.CreateQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new query.
member.param: The query string containing one or more S-expression patterns.
member.returns: The new query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.CreateLookaheadIterator(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Creates a new lookahead iterator.
member.returns: The new lookahead iterator.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Language.Symbol
member.summary: Represents a symbol in the language.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.Symbol.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.String,TreeSitter.SymbolType)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Symbol.Id
member.summary: Gets the symbol's identifier.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Symbol.Name
member.summary: Gets the symbol's name.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Symbol.Type
member.summary: Gets the symbol's type.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Language.SupertypeSymbol
member.summary: Represents a supertype symbol in the language.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.SupertypeSymbol.#ctor(TreeSitter.Language.Symbol,System.Collections.Generic.List{TreeSitter.Language.Symbol})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.SupertypeSymbol.SubtypeSymbols
member.summary: Gets a list of subtype symbols.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Language.Field
member.summary: Represents a field in the language.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Language.Field.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Field.Id
member.summary: Gets the field's identifier.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Language.Field.Name
member.summary: Gets the field's name.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.ListHelpers.TrueForSome``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{``0},System.Predicate{``0})
member.summary: Determines whether some elements in the match the conditions defined by the specified predicate.
member.param: The delegate that defines the conditions to check against the elements.
member.returns: if some elements in the match the conditions defined by the specified predicate; otherwise, . If the list has no elements, the return value is .

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Logger
member.summary: Represents a callback for log messages.
member.param: The type of the log message.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.LogType
member.summary: Specifies the type of a log message.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.LogType.Parse
member.summary: A parser message.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.LogType.Lex
member.summary: A lexer message.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator
member.summary: Represents a lookahead iterator.
member.remarks: Lookahead iterators can be useful to generate suggestions and improve syntax error diagnostics. To get symbols valid in an ERROR node, use the lookahead iterator on its first leaf node state. For `MISSING` nodes, a lookahead iterator created on the previous non-extra leaf node may be appropriate.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator.#ctor(TreeSitter.Language,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when the parser state is invalid for the language.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator.Language
member.summary: Gets the current language of the lookahead iterator.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator.Symbols
member.summary: Gets the valid symbols in the given parse state.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator.ResetState(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Resets the lookahead iterator to another state.
member.returns: if the iterator was reset to the given state; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator.Reset(TreeSitter.Language,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Resets the lookahead iterator.
member.returns: if the iterator was reset to the given state; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.LookaheadIterator.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.LookaheadSymbol
member.summary: Represents a lookahead iterator symbol.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.LookaheadSymbol.#ctor(System.UInt16,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.LookaheadSymbol.Id
member.summary: Gets the symbol's identifier.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.LookaheadSymbol.Name
member.summary: Gets the symbol's name.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Node
member.summary: Represents a node within a syntax tree.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique ID of this node.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.StartPosition
member.summary: Gets the start position in the source code.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.EndPosition
member.summary: Gets the end position in the source code.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.StartIndex
member.summary: Gets the start index in the source code.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.EndIndex
member.summary: Gets the end index in the source code.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Range
member.summary: Get the range in the source code.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Tree
member.summary: Gets the tree that this node belongs to.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Type
member.summary: Gets the node's type.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.TypeId
member.summary: Gets the node's type as a numerical ID.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.GrammarName
member.summary: Gets the node's type as it appears in the grammar ignoring aliases.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.GrammarId
member.summary: Gets the node's type as a numerical ID as it appears in the grammar, ignoring aliases.
member.remarks: GrammarId should be used in instead of .

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Text
member.summary: Gets the string content of this node.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Language
member.summary: Gets the node's language.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.IsNamed
member.summary: Checks if the node is named.
member.remarks: Named nodes correspond to named rules in the grammar, whereas anonymous nodes correspond to string literals in the grammar.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.IsExtra
member.summary: Checks if the node is extra.
member.remarks: Extra nodes represent things like comments, which are not required the grammar, but can appear anywhere.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.IsError
member.summary: Checks if this node represents a syntax error.
member.remarks: Syntax errors represent parts of the code that could not be incorporated into a valid syntax tree.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.IsMissing
member.summary: Checks if the node is missing.
member.remarks: Missing nodes are inserted by the parser in order to recover from certain kinds of syntax errors.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.HasChanges
member.summary: Checks if a syntax node has been edited.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.HasError
member.summary: Check if this node represents a syntax error or contains any syntax errors anywhere within it.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.ParseState
member.summary: Gets the parse state.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.NextParseState
member.summary: Gets the parse state after this node.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Children
member.summary: Gets the node's children.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.NamedChildren
member.summary: Gets the node's named children.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Fields
member.summary: Gets the node's children by field name.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Parent
member.summary: Gets the node's immediate parent.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.NextSibling
member.summary: Gets the node's next sibling.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.PreviousSibling
member.summary: Gets the node's previous sibling.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.NextNamedSibling
member.summary: Gets the node's next named sibling.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.PreviousNamedSibling
member.summary: Gets the node's previous named sibling.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.FirstChild
member.summary: Gets the node's first child.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.LastChild
member.summary: Gets the node's last child.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.FirstNamedChild
member.summary: Gets the node's first named child.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.LastNamedChild
member.summary: Gets the node's last named child.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.DescendantCount
member.summary: Gets the node's number of descendants, including one for the node itself.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Expression
member.summary: Gets the S-expression representation of the node.
member.returns: An S-expression representing the node as a string.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetFieldNameForChild(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the field name of this node's child at the given index.
member.returns: The field name of the child, or , if no field is found.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetFieldNameForNamedChild(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the field name of this node's named child at the given index.
member.returns: The field name of the child, or , if no field is found.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the node's child with the given field name.
member.returns: The child node with the given field name.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Node.Item(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Gets the node's child with the given field ID.
member.returns: The child node with the given field ID.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetChildForField(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the node's child with the given field name.
member.returns: The child node with the given field name, or , if no field is found.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetChildForField(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Gets the node's child with the given field ID.
member.returns: The child node with the given field ID, or , if no field is found.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetChildrenForField(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the node's children with the given field name.
member.returns: A collection of child nodes with the given field name.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetChildrenForField(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Gets the node's children with the given field ID.
member.returns: A collection of child nodes with the given field ID.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetFirstChildForIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the node's first child that contains or starts after the given offset in the text buffer.
member.param: The offset in the text buffer.
member.returns: The child node at the given offset.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetFirstNamedChildForIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the node's first named child that contains or starts after the given offset in the text buffer.
member.param: The offset in the text buffer.
member.returns: The child node at the given offset.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetChildWithDescendant(TreeSitter.Node)
member.summary: Gets the node that contains 'descendant'.
member.returns: The child node that contains 'descendant'.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetDescendantForIndex(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the smallest node within this node that spans the given range.
member.param: The start index of the range.
The end index of the range.
member.returns: The node that spans the given range.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetNamedDescendantForRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the smallest named node within this node that spans the given range.
member.param: The start index of the range.
The end index of the range.
member.returns: The node that spans the given range.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetDescendantForPosition(TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Gets the smallest node within this node that spans the given position.
member.param: The start position of the range.
member.returns: The node that spans the given range.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetDescendantForPosition(TreeSitter.Point,TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Gets the smallest node within this node that spans the given range.
member.param: The start position of the range.
The end position of the range.
member.returns: The node that spans the given range.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetNamedDescendantForPosition(TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Gets the smallest named node within this node that spans the given position.
member.param: The start position of the range.
member.returns: The node that spans the given range.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.GetNamedDescendantForPosition(TreeSitter.Point,TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Gets the smallest named node within this node that spans the given range.
member.param: The start position of the range.
The end position of the range.
member.returns: The node that spans the given range.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.Edit(TreeSitter.Edit)
member.summary: Edits the node to keep it in-sync with source code that has been edited.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.Walk
member.summary: Walks the syntax tree.
member.returns: A tree cursor starting at the current node.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.op_Equality(TreeSitter.Node,TreeSitter.Node)
member.summary: Compares two objects for equality.
member.returns: if the nodes are equal; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Node.op_Inequality(TreeSitter.Node,TreeSitter.Node)
member.summary: Compares two objects for inequality.
member.returns: if the nodes are not equal; otherwise .

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Parser
member.summary: Represents a parser that can build syntax trees from source code.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Parser.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when the parser cannot be created.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Parser.#ctor(TreeSitter.Language)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Parser.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Parser.Logger
member.summary: Sets the parser's current logger.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Parser.Language
member.summary: Gets or sets the parser's current language.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Parser.IncludedRanges
member.summary: Gets or sets the ranges of text that the parser should include when parsing.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Parser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parse some source code and create a syntax tree.
member.returns: The syntax tree.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Parser.Parse(System.String,TreeSitter.Tree)
member.summary: Parse some source code and update the previous syntax tree.
member.returns: The syntax tree.
member.remarks: If you are parsing the document for the first time, pass for . Otherwise, if you have already parsed an earlier version of this document and the document has since been edited, pass the previous syntax tree so that the unchanged parts of it can be reused. This will save time and memory. For this to work correctly, you must have already edited the old syntax tree using the function in a way that exactly matches the source code changes.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Parser.Reset
member.summary: Instruct the parser to start the next parse from the beginning.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Parser.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Point
member.summary: Represents a position in a multi-line text document, in terms of rows and columns.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Point.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Point.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Point.Row
member.summary: The zero-based row number.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Point.Column
member.summary: The zero-based column number.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Point.op_Equality(TreeSitter.Point,TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Compares two objects for equality.
member.returns: if the points are equal; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Point.op_Inequality(TreeSitter.Point,TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Compares two objects for inequality.
member.returns: if the points are not equal; otherwise .

member.name: T:TreeSitter.PredicateStep
member.summary: Represents a step in a query predicate.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.PredicateStep.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of the predicate step.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Quantifier
member.summary: Represents a quantifier used in queries.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.Quantifier.Zero
member.summary: Matches zero occurrences.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.Quantifier.ZeroOrOne
member.summary: Matches zero or one occurrence.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.Quantifier.ZeroOrMore
member.summary: Matches zero or more occurrences.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.Quantifier.One
member.summary: Matches exactly one occurrence.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.Quantifier.OneOrMore
member.summary: Matches one or more occurrences.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Query
member.summary: Represents a query object used to find patterns in syntax nodes.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Query.#ctor(TreeSitter.Language,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The query string containing one or more S-expression patterns.
member.exception: Thrown when the query cannot be created due to an error.
member.remarks: The query is associated with a particular language and can only be run on syntax nodes parsed with that language.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Query.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Query.Patterns
member.summary: Gets the patterns in this query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Query.IsPatternGuaranteedAtStep(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if a given pattern is guaranteed to match once a given step is reached.
member.param: The byte offset in the query's source code.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Query.DisableCapture(System.String)
member.summary: Disable a capture within a query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Query.Execute(TreeSitter.Node)
member.summary: Execute a query on a given node.
member.param: The node to execute the query on.
member.returns: A query cursor containing the results.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Query.Execute(TreeSitter.Node,TreeSitter.QueryOptions)
member.summary: Execute a query with options on a given node.
member.param: The node to execute the query on.
member.returns: A query cursor containing the results.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Query.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.QueryCapture
member.summary: Represents a query capture.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.#ctor(TreeSitter.Native.TSQueryCapture,System.Int32,TreeSitter.Query,TreeSitter.Tree)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The query associated with the capture.
The syntax tree containing the captured node.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.PatternIndex
member.summary: Gets the pattern index.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.Name
member.summary: Gets the capture name.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.Node
member.summary: Gets the node that was captured.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.UserPredicates
member.summary: Gets the user-defined predicates.
member.remarks: This user-defined predicates include predicates with operators other than: - 'match?' - 'eq?' and 'not-eq?' - 'any-of?' and 'not-any-of?' - 'is?' and 'is-not?' - 'set!'

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.AssertedProperties
member.summary: Gets the properties for predicates declared with the operator 'is?'.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.RefutedProperties
member.summary: Gets the properties for predicates declared with the operator 'is-not?'.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCapture.SetProperties
member.summary: Gets the properties for predicates declared with the operator 'set!'.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.QueryCursor
member.summary: Represents a cursor for executing a given query.
member.remarks: The cursor stores the state that is needed to iteratively search for matches. To use the query cursor, first call 'Execute' to start running a given query on a given syntax node. Then, there are two options for consuming the results of the query: 1. Iterate over the matches using the 'Matches' property. 2. Iterate over the captures using the 'Captures' property. If you don't care about consuming all of the results, you can stop iterating at any point. You can then start executing another query on another node by calling 'Execute' again.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.MatchLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of in-progress matches allowed.
member.remarks: By default, query cursors allow any number of pending matches.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.IsMatchLimitExceeded
member.summary: Check if, on its last execution, this cursor exceeded its maximum number of in-progress matches.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.Matches
member.summary: Gets the matches of the currently running query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.Captures
member.summary: Gets the captures of the currently running query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.SetRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the range of bytes in which the query will be executed.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.SetRange(TreeSitter.Point,TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Set the range of (row, column) positions in which the query will be executed.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.Execute(TreeSitter.Query,TreeSitter.Node)
member.summary: Execute a query on a given node.
member.param: The node to execute the query on.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryCursor.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.QueryError
member.summary: Represents the possible errors that can occur when working with queries.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryError.None
member.summary: No error occurred.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryError.Syntax
member.summary: A syntax error occurred in the query.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryError.NodeType
member.summary: An invalid node type was specified in the query.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryError.Field
member.summary: An invalid field name was specified in the query.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryError.Capture
member.summary: An invalid capture name was specified in the query.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryError.Structure
member.summary: The query has an invalid structure.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryError.Language
member.summary: The query is not compatible with the language.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.QueryMatch
member.summary: Represents a query match.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.#ctor(TreeSitter.Native.TSQueryMatch,TreeSitter.Query,TreeSitter.Tree)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The query associated with the match.
The syntax tree containing the match.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.Id
member.summary: Gets the match ID.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.PatternIndex
member.summary: Gets the pattern index of the match.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.Captures
member.summary: Gets the captures of the query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.UserPredicates
member.summary: Gets the user-defined predicates.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.AssertedProperties
member.summary: Gets the properties for predicates declared with the operator 'is?'.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.RefutedProperties
member.summary: Gets the properties for predicates declared with the operator 'is-not?'.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryMatch.SetProperties
member.summary: Gets the properties for predicates declared with the operator 'set!'.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.QueryOptions
member.summary: Represents the options for executing a query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryOptions.MatchLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of matches to be returned.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryOptions.StartIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the start index of the query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryOptions.EndIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the end index of the query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryOptions.StartPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the start point of the query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryOptions.EndPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the end point of the query.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.QueryPattern
member.summary: Represents a pattern in a query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryPattern.#ctor(TreeSitter.Query,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The query associated with the pattern.
The index of the pattern in the query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryPattern.Index
member.summary: Gets the pattern index in the query.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryPattern.StartIndex
member.summary: Gets the offset where the given pattern starts in the query's source.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryPattern.EndIndex
member.summary: Gets the offset where the given pattern ends in the query's source.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryPattern.IsRooted
member.summary: Check if the given pattern in the query has a single root node.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.QueryPattern.IsNonLocal
member.summary: Check if the given pattern in the query is 'non local'.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.QueryPattern.Disable
member.summary: Disable the pattern within a query.
member.remarks: This prevents the pattern from matching and removes most of the overhead associated with the pattern. Currently, there is no way to undo this.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.QueryPredicateStepType
member.summary: Represents the types of steps in a query predicate.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryPredicateStepType.Done
member.summary: Indicates the end of a predicate.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryPredicateStepType.Capture
member.summary: Represents a capture step in a predicate.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.QueryPredicateStepType.String
member.summary: Represents a string step in a predicate.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Range
member.summary: Represents a range of positions in a multi-line text document, both in terms of bytes and of rows and columns.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Range.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Range.#ctor(TreeSitter.Point,TreeSitter.Point,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The start position of the range.
The end position of the range.
The start index of the range.
The end index of the range.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Range.StartPosition
member.summary: The start position of the range.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Range.EndPosition
member.summary: The end position of the range.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Range.StartIndex
member.summary: The start index of the range.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Range.EndIndex
member.summary: The end index of the range.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.RangeCollection
member.summary: Represents a collection of ranges in a multi-line text document.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.RangeCollection.#ctor(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Pointer to the unmanaged array of ranges.
The number of ranges in the collection.
Indicates whether the unmanaged memory should be freed when disposed.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.RangeCollection.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.RangeCollection.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.StringPredicateStep
member.summary: Represents a string predicate step in a query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.StringPredicateStep.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of .

member.name: P:TreeSitter.StringPredicateStep.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of the predicate step.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.StringPredicateStep.Value
member.summary: Gets the string value.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.SymbolType
member.summary: Specifies the type of a symbol.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.SymbolType.Regular
member.summary: A regular symbol.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.SymbolType.Anonymous
member.summary: An anonymous symbol.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.SymbolType.Supertype
member.summary: A supertype symbol.

member.name: F:TreeSitter.SymbolType.Auxiliary
member.summary: An auxiliary symbol.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.TextPredicate
member.summary: Represents a text predicate used in a query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TextPredicate.#ctor(System.Predicate{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{TreeSitter.QueryCapture}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.TextPredicate.Predicate
member.summary: Gets the predicate function.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.Tree
member.summary: Represents the syntactic structure of a source code file.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.#ctor(System.IntPtr,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The native pointer to the tree.
The source code associated with the tree.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Tree.Source
member.summary: Gets the source code that this syntax tree was parsed from.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Tree.RootNode
member.summary: Gets the root node of the syntax tree.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Tree.Language
member.summary: Gets the language that was used to parse the syntax tree.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.Tree.IncludedRanges
member.summary: Gets an array of included ranges that was used to parse the syntax tree.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.GetText(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the string content of a range in the text buffer.
member.returns: The string content.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.Copy
member.summary: Creates a copy of the syntax tree.
member.returns: The copied syntax tree.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.GetRootNodeWithIndex(System.Int32,TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Gets the root node of the syntax tree, but with its position shifted forward by the given offset.
member.param: The index to the source code.
member.returns: The root node with the offset applied.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.GetChangedRanges(TreeSitter.Tree)
member.summary: Gets an array of included ranges that was used to parse the syntax tree.
member.param: The tree that includes the changes made to this tree.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.Edit(TreeSitter.Edit)
member.summary: Edits the syntax tree to keep it in sync with source code that has been edited.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.Walk
member.summary: Walks the syntax tree.
member.returns: A tree cursor starting at the root node.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.Tree.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.TreeCursor
member.summary: Represents a tree cursor for walking a syntax tree efficiently.
member.remarks: A tree cursor allows you to walk a syntax tree more efficiently than is possible using the 'Node' functions.It is a mutable object that is always on a certain syntax node, and can be moved imperatively to different nodes. Note that the given node is considered the root of the cursor, and the cursor cannot walk outside this node.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.#ctor(TreeSitter.Node)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes the object.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.CurrentNode
member.summary: Gets the tree cursor's current node.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.CurrentFieldId
member.summary: Gets the numerical field ID of the tree cursor's current node, or zero, if the current node doesn't have a field.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.CurrentFieldName
member.summary: Gets the field name of the tree cursor's current node, or , if the current node doesn't have a field.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.CurrentDepth
member.summary: Gets the depth of the cursor's current node relative to the original node that the cursor was constructed with.

member.name: P:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.CurrentDescendantIndex
member.summary: Gets the index of the cursor's current node out of all of the descendants of the original node that the cursor was constructed with.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.Reset(TreeSitter.Node)
member.summary: Re-initializes the cursor to start at the original node that the cursor was constructed with.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.ResetTo(TreeSitter.TreeCursor)
member.summary: Re-initializes the cursor to the same position as another cursor.
member.remarks: Unlike , this will not lose parent information and allows reusing already created cursors.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoParent
member.summary: Moves the cursor to the parent of its current node.
member.returns: if the cursor successfully moved; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoFirstChild
member.summary: Moves the cursor to the first child of its current node.
member.returns: if the cursor successfully moved; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoLastChild
member.summary: Moves the cursor to the last child of its current node.
member.returns: if the cursor successfully moved; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoNextSibling
member.summary: Moves the cursor to the next sibling of its current node.
member.returns: if the cursor successfully moved; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoPreviousSibling
member.summary: Moves the cursor to the previous sibling of its current node.
member.returns: if the cursor successfully moved; otherwise .

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoDescendant(System.Int32)
member.summary: Move the cursor to the node that is the nth descendant of the original node that the cursor was constructed with.
member.param: The index of the descendant, where zero represents the original node itself.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoFirstChild(System.Int32)
member.summary: Move the cursor to the first child of its current node that contains or starts after the given offset.
member.returns: The index of the child node if one was found, or -1, if no such child was found.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.GotoFirstChild(TreeSitter.Point)
member.summary: Move the cursor to the first child of its current node that contains or starts after the given point.
member.returns: The index of the child node if one was found, or -1, if no such child was found.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.Copy
member.summary: Creates a copy of the tree cursor.
member.returns: The copied tree cursor.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.TreeCursor.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: Set to to dispose managed resources.

member.name: T:TreeSitter.UserPredicate
member.summary: Represents a user-defined predicate in a query.

member.name: M:TreeSitter.UserPredicate.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{TreeSitter.PredicateStep})
member.summary: Creates a new instance of .

member.name: P:TreeSitter.UserPredicate.Steps
member.summary: Gets the list of predicate steps.
